content: We can reframe intrinsic curiosity bonuses (from ICM/RND curiosity-driven RL) as attention-weighted episodic memory retrieval gates, where prediction error magnitude from curiosity modules dynamically gates which new exploratory experiences get stored and prioritized for replay in Transformer-based episodic memory architectures for autonomous agents. This design lets curious agents prune noisy, uninformative exploratory trajectories from memory before they clog attention computation.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
